calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 2925 California Street Condominium Homeowners' Association, an unicorporated association.
No appearance by defendant Nikolas T. Sikelianos.
Default was entered against defendant on June 18, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 18, 2010.
Plaintiff's witness appeared at the last calling of the case, and his appearance was excused by the Court for today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 2925 California Street Condominium Homeowners' Association, an unicorporated association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Nikolas T. Sikelianos as follows:

Damages/Principal - $6,388.42.
Attorney Fees - $3,080.00.
Costs - $1,040.10, for a total judgment in the amount of $10,508.52.

Judgement was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
